disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden dark-blue discolouration of the lips and mouth coming on within minutes of straining during a bowel movement, in a baby known to have a heart condition awaiting surgery
trigger_question_examples: What was he doing when this started?
What colour are his lips and face now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He was straining to do a poo and then his lips and mouth went dark blue really suddenly. He was born with a heart problem and is waiting for an operation.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe respiratory distress — very fast, laboured, gasping breathing with chest recession
trigger_question_examples: How is his breathing right now?
Is his chest sucking in when he breathes?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's breathing really fast and gasping, and I can see his chest and ribs sucking in with every breath.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Prolonged, worsening episode not self-resolving, unlike previous brief spells
trigger_question_examples: Has he had turns like this before?
How long has this one lasted compared with the others?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's had little blue turns before but they always stopped by themselves in a minute or two. This one has gone on for about half an hour and is getting worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Extreme agitation, inconsolable crying, profuse sweating and reduced interaction
trigger_question_examples: How is he behaving — is he alert and settling at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's crying and crying and we can't settle him, he's drenched in sweat, and he seems to be interacting with us less than normal.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known congenital heart condition with a murmur, poor feeding and failure to thrive, no regular cardiac medications, awaiting surgical repair
trigger_question_examples: Does he have any medical conditions?
Is he on any regular medicines?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He was born with a heart problem — a hole in the heart and a murmur — and he feeds poorly and is small for his age. He's not on any regular heart medicines yet, he's waiting for surgery.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Parents are holding the infant lying flat on his back
trigger_question_examples: What position is he in right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: We've been holding him lying flat on his back on the couch.
